headline: 3 Reasons to Sell CHTR and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Charter has gotten torched over the last six months - since November 2025, its stock price has dropped 25.4% to $148.50 per share. This was partly driven by its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.
